title: Verify user can access Trial Corner Hub from homepage widget
description: Test that clicking the trial widget navigates user to the dedicated Trial Corner dashboard
preconditions: User is on homepage with trial widget visible

steps.description: 1. Navigate to homepage with active trial
2. Click on the trial widget showing remaining days
3. Verify navigation to Trial Corner page

expected_result: User is redirected to Trial Corner Hub displaying trial status, benefits, content sections, and manage trial options
